mapper.select: SELECT lgs.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, s.title, s.defense_group_id, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM large_group_score lgs LEFT JOIN t_student s ON lgs.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON lgs.teacher_id = t.id WHERE lgs.student_id = #{studentId} AND lgs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND lgs.year = #{year}

SELECT lgs.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, s.title, s.defense_group_id, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM large_group_score lgs LEFT JOIN t_student s ON lgs.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON lgs.teacher_id = t.id WHERE lgs.student_id = #{studentId} AND lgs.year = #{year} ORDER BY lgs.created_time DESC

SELECT lgs.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, s.title, s.defense_group_id, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM large_group_score lgs LEFT JOIN t_student s ON lgs.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON lgs.teacher_id = t.id WHERE lgs.year = #{year} ORDER BY lgs.student_id, lgs.teacher_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO large_group_score (student_id, teacher_id, year, score, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{teacherId}, #{year}, #{score}, NOW(), NOW())
